---
title: "Computer Club"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
toc: false
subtitle: "A community-driven technology club for all ages"
description: "Building digital literacy and community through technology education"
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=/academy/programs/computerclub/" />
<script>window.location.href = "/academy/programs/computerclub/";</script>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="alert alert-info mt-5">
      <p>This page has moved. If you are not redirected automatically, please <a href="/academy/programs/computerclub/">click here</a>.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
